steps.title: Focus on the advantage
steps.content: The student needs to explain why microprobes are advantageous. The relevant notes contrast heavy wheeled rovers, which cannot reach some regions, with microprobes, which are tiny and could be deployed virtually anywhere on Mars.

steps.title: Use only relevant notes
steps.content: Choice A discusses rovers, Choice C only says microprobes were proposed, and Choice D gives a vague comparison. The useful sentence must connect microprobes' light weight to access in places rovers cannot go. The answer is B.
